scope.summary: Bridge the zca-rust WebSocket Listener into the core and forward incoming chat messages to the frontend as zalo://message Tauri events, verified by a live round trip.
goals: zalo/ starts the Listener from login info and maps ListenerEvent::Message into a core IncomingMessage DTO (zca-rust types stay in the zalo layer)
command/ start_listening logs in, spawns the bridge, and emits zalo://message events; the listener handle is kept in managed state
Live smoke: a real message round-trips through the websocket and is surfaced as IncomingMessage
nonGoals: Non-message events (typing, seen, reactions) beyond what is needed here

acceptance.description: zalo/ spawns the Listener and maps ListenerEvent::Message into IncomingMessage; offline guards (empty creds) still hold.
Frontend subscribes to zalo://message and renders incoming messages; build succeeds.
A real incoming message is surfaced through the bridge in realtime (live websocket round trip).
